raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz taderreja wiꞥſch no
Israëta ſints tuhſtoſchus war-
renus ſtiprus Karra-Wihruß/par
ſints Talenteem Sudraba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet weens Deewa Wihrß
nahze pee winna/ un fazzija: Ak
Kehniſch ! lai tas Israëta
Spehks ar tewim ne eet/ jo tas
KUNGS ne irr ar Israëtu/ nedß
ar wiſſeem Eewraima Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ja tu eij/ un (to) dar-
ri (ka) tu drohſch effi karroht/
tad liks tew Deews Eenaidnee-
fu Preeſcha krist/ jo eeſch Dee-
ta irr Spehks palihdſeht / un
nogahß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Amazijus fazzija us to
Deewa Wihru: Bet ko tad es
darrischu ar teem ſints Talen-
teem/ fo es Israëta Karra-Wih-
reem efmu dewis? Bet tas Dee-
ta Wihruß fazzija: Tam KUN-
GAM irr wairak tew doht / ne
ka tik dauds.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad afschihre Amazijus
tohß Karra-Wihruß / kas no Ee-
wräima bija pee winna nahku-
schi/ ka teem bij us ſawahm Mah-
jahm eet. Tapehz apskaitahß
tee tohti prett Juhdu / un tee
greesahß ar leelahm Dufnahm
atkat atpakkat us ſawahm Mah-
jahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Amazijus ſtriiprina-
jahß/ un iſwaddija ſawus Lau-
diß/ un zehſlehs Sahlß-Eeleija/un
fawe deſſints tuhſtoſchus no
Seira Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir tee Behrni Juhda
guhſtija no teem defmits tuhſ-
ſchus dſihwuß/ un wedde t
Akmiña-Kalna Gallá/un nog
fe tohs no paſcha Akmiña-
na Galla/ ka tee wiſſi puſch-
sprahge.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee Karra-Wihri,
Amazijus lizzis atpakkat eet/
tee ar winnu Karra ne eetu/
eelausahß eeſch Juhda Pils-
teem no Samarijas lihds V
Ohronam/ un kawe no teem t-
tuhſtoſchus/un isneſte leelu L
pijumu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Amazijus ne
Fedomitern Kaufchanas p-
gahje/ un to Seira Behrnu T
wus lihds bij atweddis/ tad
zehſe wiꞥſch tohs ſewim par E-
wrem/ un paſlannijahß pre-
teem/ un kwehpinaja teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tas KUNGS f
reedutmojahß prett Amaziju/
wiꞥſch ſuhtija pee ta weenu
weetu/ tas fazzija us wi-
Kapehz effi tu to Lauschu
wus meklejs/ kas ſawus La-
no tavas Röhlß ne warre
atpeſtiht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu wiꞥſch us t-
runnaja / tad fazzija tas
winnu : Effi tu par ta Keh-
Padohmu·Deweju eezelts/
tejeß/ kapehz gribbi tu k-
tapt? tad mittejahß tas
weets/ un fazzija : Gann ee-
ſihſtu/ ka Deews irr apnehu-
tew ſamaitaht/ tapehz ka tu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
